caption: A man with short dark hair and facial stubble is recorded in a studio setting, positioned in front of a professional microphone and wearing large black over-ear headphones. He is dressed in a dark jacket over a gray shirt. Behind him is a dark, textured acoustic foam wall consisting of vertical and horizontal ribbed patterns. In the initial sequence, the man looks slightly upward and to his right with an attentive expression. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his gaze further to the right, looking toward someone or something off-camera. Throughout the clip, his facial expression remains relatively neutral, and his position remains stationary while he speaks into the microphone, which is mounted on a black shock mount arm. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
